full_name: André Mendes, Doctor of Science (Hon.), MBA
occupation: Chief Information and Artificial Intelligence Officer at Tarrant County
headline:
Chief Information & Artificial Intelligence Officer, Tarrant County, TX
Former CIO & CAIO, Dept. Commerce
Former_CEO/COO/CIO/CTO/CFO, US Agency Global Media
Former_SVP, Strat. Plan. & Global CIO, Special Olympics
summary:
Serial, industry changing, iconoclast. CEO/COO/CIO/CTO│ Creating Global Growth and Impact through disruptive innovation. Boundless energy. Dramatic increases in employee morale and productivity.

As a Global C-Level Executive, leads rapid and profound organizational transformation in the most challenging environments. Recognized expert and thought leader on highest level global stages – Heads of State, White House, EU, and Congress – globally recognized for forward-thinking vision, focused leadership and strategic decision-making, resolving critical issues, restoring operational excellence and profitability while reinventing industries.

Active Top Secret/SCI Clearance

In-depth CXO experience in Operations, Technology, Media, Financial, Healthcare, Travel, Government and Scientific arenas

Career Highlights:

Tarrant County, TX

Rapid reconstruction of a failing department
Successfully deployed multiple AI projects with immediate operational impact 
Stabilized Criminal Justice ERP
Completed migration to Entirely software Defined networks with scaling on demand
Restored broken relationships with elected and appointed officials County-wide 
Led cost avoidance Digital Criminal Evidence with 10-year savings estimated at $39M+

Department of Commerce

	Longest tenured and most consequential Commerce CIO
	Strategic and operational responsibility for $3.8 Billion Global Technology Budget
	Overseeing IT for NOAA, Census, NIST, PTO, ITA, BEA, BIS, ITA and 7 other smaller Bureaus

Massive Department-wide Networking and Cybersecurity consolidation.

Department of Commerce/International Trade Administration (ITA)

Led the Bureau to become the first 100% Cloud based Agency/Bureau of the United States Government.

Imagined, developed and launched Steel and Aluminum 232 tariffs online portal in 10 month radically enhancing US Government's ability to handle workflows associated with tariffs implementation and collection of tens of billions of dollars.

BROADCASTING BOARD OF GOVERNORS

CEO of the Office of Cuba Broadcasting, restructured programming on all platforms (TV, Radio and online) in 6 months. 

Promoted from CIO to COO and Interim CEO. Administered $750M+ Agency; 3,500 global employees. 
Transformed global distribution strategy, saving $503M over 10 years, radically increasing BBG’s agility.
Migrated mostly radio to all platform strategy driving weekly audiences up 68% from 165 to 278 M.


PBS

Led PBS through $1.8B DTV transition

2021 Class CIO Hall of Fame. 
MIT CIO Innovation Award. 

Fluent in Spanish | Portuguese | French

experiences.title: Chief Information and Artificial Intelligence Officer
Chief Information and Artificial Intelligence Officer
experiences.description:
Overall responsibility over all technology systems at the United States Department of Commerce and all of its associated Bureaus (FY2020 Budget $3.8B). 

Seamless transition to 100% Telework for entire working population throughout the country (120K+)

This includes oversight of the Information Technology systems and other technology platforms at the following Bureaus:

National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA)
United States Census Bureau
National Institute of Standards and Technology
United States Patent and Trademark Office
International Trade Administration (ITA)
Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA)
Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS)
Economic Development Administration (EDA)
Minority Business Development Agency (MBDA)
National Technical Information Service (NTIS)
National Telecommunications and Information Administration (NTIA)
Office of the Secretary (OS)

experiences.company: Department of Commerce - International Trade Administration
experiences.title: Chief Information Officer
experiences.description:
Responsible for all Global Technology Platforms and Systems for the Agency that manages all of the issues associated with Global Trade for the United States of America.

Driving agency-wide Transformation and Digitalization effort, radically changing workflows and enabling massive scale-up of service provisioning while lowering overall operating costs.

experiences.title: CEO/COO/CIO/CTO
experiences.description:
CIO/CTO - December 2009 - March, 2018
Acting CEO, Office of Cuba Broadcasting, September 2017 - March, 2018
Interim CEO and Agency Director, March 2015 – September 2015
Director, Global Operations(COO), Acting CFO, January 2014 – March 2015

Managed unprecedented Federal space transformation generating over $200 Million in savings from 2012 through 2017 through aggressive global optimization. Calculated 10 year savings projection in excess of half a billion dollars. Global Weekly audiences growth 78% (165-278M) during tenure while reducing technology and front office staff by over 20%.

Appointed Interim CEO and Agency Director by unanimous Board vote administering all U.S. civilian broadcasts abroad. 61 languages into 100+ countries. 

Controlled $750M+ budget and operations in every continent, driving the most diverse distribution portfolio of any global media organization. Executed rapid, multi-pronged Agency transformation across media, back office operations and technology platforms,

Executed a stunning 6 month turnaround at the Office of Cuba Broadcasting, delivering a brand new schedule on all platforms, radically increasing in-island distribution. Dramatic increase in employee morale from the lowest to the highest levels in the entire Agency. 

Formulated Agency’s FY14, 15 and 16 budgets. Testify in Congress, present to authorizers and appropriators, brief White House and Congressional oversight committees on all BBG matters.

Administered $240M combined budgets and grants for Radio Free Asia, Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty, and the Middle Eastern Broadcast Networks.

Authored and implemented Agency’s 2012 – 2015 and 2016-2018 Technology Strategic Plans driving a complete transformation of IT, back-office and broadcast technology environments. 

Transformed the BBG from a 2010 technology laggard into the Federal Agency with the highest percentage of cloud based applications by 2015. First Agency to implement a full complement of Office 365 functionality.

experiences.title: SVP Strategic Planning & Global CIO
experiences.description:
Oversaw all strategic planning, transformed global organization through leading edge technology and raised the bar in garnering funds, while bringing tremendous growth to the global Special Olympics movement.

Technology and Media Innovation: Transformed Broadcast, New Media, and IT operations and logistics for 2007 Shanghai games and largest ever Winter Olympics (Boise Idaho, 2009). 

Administration and Global Growth: Administered the $56M Christmas Record Trust, providing $3.5M in yearly grants to country programs in the developing world (87% growth in two years).

experiences.title: Chief Technology Integration Officer (CIO & CTO)
experiences.description:
Engaged back to spearhead the migration to Digital Television, the largest project in the history of the system.

Cost Reduction: Optimized satellite/terrestrial distribution network, reducing costs by $57M over 10 years.

Broadcasting Excellence: Oversaw PBS’s $1.8B federally mandated migration to Digital Television, encompassing 377 stations. First major broadcaster to achieve system-wide compliance.

experiences.title: Chief Operating Officer
experiences.description: Assembled world-class Scientific Advisory Board and Management Team, hiring 66 employees comprised of Molecular Geneticists, Bio-Informatics personnel and laboratory technicians. After initial financing, post 9/11, VC Markets collapsed and company was unable to secure second round of funding, resulting in a company shutdown. Successfully administered company shutdown, staff layoffs, physical and IP asset liquidation, dissolution of leases and disposition of all financial obligations with no adverse legal implications.

experiences.title: Chief Information Officer
experiences.description:
Technology Excellence: On-time/on-budget ERP deployment, retiring non-Y2K compliant applications.

Media Industry Leader: Designed and deployed infrastructure for www.pbs.org, third most trafficked .org site in the world, routinely serving over 200,000,000 page views per month by 2001.

recommendations:
Clinton O'Brien

Andre Mendes, who rose to be CIO when we were both working at PBS, is a dynamic leader and a thoughtful executive who proved repeatedly that he can get things done, despite daunting obstacles. At PBS, Andre led a large department with many demands placed on it by our own organization as well as by local PBS stations nationwide. Andre not only managed his department effectively but also led PBS and the public television system through major overhauls and reinventions. Most significant of these was the replacement of our satellite-based broadcast TV model with a new IP-based model of distributing TV programming content digitally over the Internet. Andre also managed the difficult process of relocating PBS's expanding server farm to more robust facilities, and virtualizing much of PBS's technical infrastructure to streamline it and make it more efficient. There were many other large IT projects, too, and Andre had ultimate responsibility for all of them. Andre's tenure at PBS showed that he is a real change agent, whose exceptional communication skills and basic decency enabled him to build the necessary consensus, tirelessly and diplomatically, without which it is impossible to be effective in the highly decentralized world of public broadcasting. To top it off, he is a fun person to work with. Andre is a major asset to any organization lucky enough to have him.

Bradford Sims, PhD, FRAeS

I have had the pleasure of working closely with André Mendes since 2017, and I can confidently say he is a remarkable professional and a visionary leader. Throughout our years of collaboration, André has consistently demonstrated exceptional strategic thinking and a clear vision for the future.

André’s ability to foresee industry trends and navigate complex challenges has been invaluable to our team's success. His innovative approach and dedication to excellence inspire everyone around him. He not only possesses a deep understanding of our field but also shows an unwavering commitment to driving progress and achieving outstanding results.

Beyond his professional expertise, André is an exceptional communicator and a team player. He fosters a collaborative environment where ideas flourish, and every team member feels valued. His leadership style encourages growth and development, making him an asset to any organization.

His visionary mindset, coupled with his extensive experience, makes him a standout professional and a true leader in his field.

Bradford Sims, PhD, FRAeS

I have had the pleasure of working closely with André Mendes since 2017, and I can confidently say he is a remarkable professional and a visionary leader. Throughout our years of collaboration, André has consistently demonstrated exceptional strategic thinking and a clear vision for the future.Andrés ability to foresee industry trends and navigate complex challenges has been invaluable to our team's success. His innovative approach and dedication to excellence inspire everyone around him. He fosters a collaborative environment where ideas flourish, and every team member feels valued. His leadership style encourages growth and development, making him an asset to any organization.His visionary mindset, coupled with his extensive experience, makes him a standout professional and a true leader in his field.

Jon Panker

Now here's a guy who really knows his stuff and knows how to get an audience interested in it. Andre joined us for a three-city roadshow in India to promote the launch of our magazines and delivered an hour-long presentation at each stop. His talk received rave reviews. Andre has the rare ability to identify broad trends, communicate them effectively and then share practical insights on how to keep pace. The next time I plan an event, he'll be the first speaker I invite.
